R

ReadListener - com.android.decode中的接口
This interface is used by the application to listen to the decoder's read event.
REGEXP_EDIT - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
REGEXP_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
regexpEdit - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Formatting
 
regexpEnable - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Formatting
 
release() - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
Removes and clears all the registered listeners, in case some application did not call removal methods.
REMOTE_CALL_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.decode.DecodeException
When it's not possible to call Datalogic service.
REMOTE_CALL_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
When it's not possible to call Datalogic service.
REMOTE_CALL_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.device.DeviceException
When it's not possible to call Datalogic service.
REMOVE_NON_PRINTABLE_CHARS - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
removeFrameCaptureListener(FrameCaptureListener) - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
Unregisters a FrameCaptureListener associated with the decoder.
removeFrameSaveListener(FrameSaveListener) - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
Unregisters a FrameSaveListener associated with the decoder.
removeReadListener(ReadListener) - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
Unregisters a ReadListener associated with the decoder.
removeSame - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.AutoScan
 
removeStartListener(StartListener) - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
Unregisters a StartListener associated with the decoder.
removeStopListener(StopListener) - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
Unregisters a StopListener associated with the decoder.
removeTimeoutListener(TimeoutListener) - 类 中的方法com.android.decode.BarcodeManager
Unregisters a TimeoutListener associated with the decoder.
require - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.UpcEanExtensions
require indicates that are read only barcode with the supplemental label.
require2Checksum - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.Msi
require2Checksum requires that a MSI label contains two check digits.
ROYAL_MAIL_CODE_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
ROYAL_MAIL_ENABLE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
ROYAL_MAIL_SEND_CHECK - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
